speaker: IMOGEN
text: A father cruel and a stepdame false,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: A foolish suitor to a wedded lady

speaker: IMOGEN
text: That hath her husband banished. O, that husband,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: My supreme crown of grief and those repeated

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Vexations of it! Had I been thief-stol’n,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: As my two brothers, happy; but most miserable

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Is the desire that’s glorious. Blessed be those,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: How mean soe’er, that have their honest wills,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Which seasons comfort. Who may this be? Fie!

speaker: PISANIO
text: Madam, a noble gentleman of Rome

speaker: PISANIO
text: Comes from my lord with letters.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Change you, madam?

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The worthy Leonatus is in safety

speaker: IACHIMO
text: And greets your Highness dearly.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Thanks, good sir.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: You’re kindly welcome.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: All of her that is out of door, most rich!

speaker: IACHIMO
text: If she be furnished with a mind so rare,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: She is alone th’ Arabian bird, and I

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Have lost the wager. Boldness be my friend.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Arm me, audacity, from head to foot,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Or like the Parthian I shall flying fight—

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Rather, directly fly.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: So far I read aloud.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: But even the very middle of my heart

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Is warmed by th’ rest and takes it thankfully.—

speaker: IMOGEN
text: You are as welcome, worthy sir, as I

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Have words to bid you, and shall find it so

speaker: IMOGEN
text: In all that I can do.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Thanks, fairest lady.—

speaker: IACHIMO
text: What, are men mad? Hath nature given them eyes

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To see this vaulted arch and the rich crop

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Of sea and land, which can distinguish ’twixt

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The fiery orbs above and the twinned stones

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Upon the numbered beach, and can we not

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Partition make with spectacles so precious

speaker: IACHIMO
text: ’Twixt fair and foul?

speaker: IMOGEN
text: What makes your admiration?

speaker: IACHIMO
text: It cannot be i’ th’ eye, for apes and monkeys

speaker: IACHIMO
text: ’Twixt two such shes would chatter this way and

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Contemn with mows the other; nor i’ th’ judgment,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: For idiots in this case of favor would

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Be wisely definite; nor i’ th’ appetite—

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Sluttery to such neat excellence opposed

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Should make desire vomit emptiness,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Not so allured to feed.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: What is the matter, trow?

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The cloyèd will,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: That satiate yet unsatisfied desire, that tub

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Both filled and running, ravening first the lamb,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Longs after for the garbage.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: What, dear sir,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Thus raps you? Are you well?

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Thanks, madam, well.

speaker: IACHIMO
text:
(
                To
                 
                Pisanio
                .
                )
                 
              Beseech you, sir,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Desire my man’s abode where I did leave him.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: He’s strange and peevish.

speaker: PISANIO
text: I was going, sir,

speaker: PISANIO
text: To give him welcome.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Continues well my lord? His health, beseech you?

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Well, madam.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Is he disposed to mirth? I hope he is.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Exceeding pleasant. None a stranger there

speaker: IACHIMO
text: So merry and so gamesome. He is called

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The Briton Reveler.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: When he was here

speaker: IMOGEN
text: He did incline to sadness, and ofttimes

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Not knowing why.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: I never saw him sad.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: There is a Frenchman his companion, one

speaker: IACHIMO
text: An eminent monsieur that, it seems, much loves

speaker: IACHIMO
text: A Gallian girl at home. He furnaces

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The thick sighs from him, whiles the jolly Briton—

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Your lord, I mean—laughs from ’s free lungs, cries “O,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Can my sides hold to think that man who knows

speaker: IACHIMO
text: By history, report, or his own proof

speaker: IACHIMO
text: What woman is, yea, what she cannot choose

speaker: IACHIMO
text: But must be, will ’s free hours languish for

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Assurèd bondage?”

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Will my lord say so?

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Ay, madam, with his eyes in flood with laughter.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: It is a recreation to be by

speaker: IACHIMO
text: And hear him mock the Frenchman. But heavens know

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Some men are much to blame.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Not he, I hope.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Not he—but yet heaven’s bounty towards him might

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Be used more thankfully. In himself ’tis much;

speaker: IACHIMO
text: In you, which I account his, beyond all talents.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Whilst I am bound to wonder, I am bound

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To pity too.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: What do you pity, sir?

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Two creatures heartily.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Am I one, sir?

speaker: IMOGEN
text: You look on me. What wrack discern you in me

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Deserves your pity?

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Lamentable! What,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To hide me from the radiant sun and solace

speaker: IACHIMO
text: I’ th’ dungeon by a snuff?

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I pray you, sir,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Deliver with more openness your answers

speaker: IMOGEN
text: To my demands. Why do you pity me?

speaker: IACHIMO
text: That others do—

speaker: IACHIMO
text: I was about to say, enjoy your—but

speaker: IACHIMO
text: It is an office of the gods to venge it,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Not mine to speak on ’t.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: You do seem to know

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Something of me or what concerns me. Pray you,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Since doubting things go ill often hurts more

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Than to be sure they do—for certainties

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Either are past remedies, or, timely knowing,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: The remedy then born—discover to me

speaker: IMOGEN
text: What both you spur and stop.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Had I this cheek

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To bathe my lips upon; this hand, whose touch,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Whose every touch, would force the feeler’s soul

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To th’ oath of loyalty; this object which

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Takes prisoner the wild motion of mine eye,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Fixing it only here; should I, damned then,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Slaver with lips as common as the stairs

speaker: IACHIMO
text: That mount the Capitol, join gripes with hands

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Made hard with hourly falsehood—falsehood as

speaker: IACHIMO
text: With labor; then by-peeping in an eye

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Base and illustrous as the smoky light

speaker: IACHIMO
text: That’s fed with stinking tallow; it were fit

speaker: IACHIMO
text: That all the plagues of hell should at one time

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Encounter such revolt.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: My lord, I fear,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Has forgot Britain.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: And himself. Not I,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Inclined to this intelligence, pronounce

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The beggary of his change, but ’tis your graces

speaker: IACHIMO
text: That from my mutest conscience to my tongue

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Charms this report out.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Let me hear no more.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: O dearest soul, your cause doth strike my heart

speaker: IACHIMO
text: With pity that doth make me sick. A lady

speaker: IACHIMO
text: So fair, and fastened to an empery

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Would make the great’st king double, to be partnered

speaker: IACHIMO
text: With tomboys hired with that self exhibition

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Which your own coffers yield, with diseased ventures

speaker: IACHIMO
text: That play with all infirmities for gold

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Which rottenness can lend nature; such boiled stuff

speaker: IACHIMO
text: As well might poison poison. Be revenged,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Or she that bore you was no queen, and you

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Recoil from your great stock.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Revenged?

speaker: IMOGEN
text: How should I be revenged? If this be true—

speaker: IMOGEN
text: As I have such a heart that both mine ears

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Must not in haste abuse—if it be true,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: How should I be revenged?

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Should he make me

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Live like Diana’s priest betwixt cold sheets,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Whiles he is vaulting variable ramps,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: In your despite, upon your purse? Revenge it.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: I dedicate myself to your sweet pleasure,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: More noble than that runagate to your bed,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: And will continue fast to your affection,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Still close as sure.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: What ho, Pisanio!

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Let me my service tender on your lips.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Away! I do condemn mine ears that have

speaker: IMOGEN
text: So long attended thee. If thou wert honorable,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Thou wouldst have told this tale for virtue, not

speaker: IMOGEN
text: For such an end thou seek’st, as base as strange.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Thou wrong’st a gentleman who is as far

speaker: IMOGEN
text: From thy report as thou from honor, and

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Solicits here a lady that disdains

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Thee and the devil alike.—What ho, Pisanio!—

speaker: IMOGEN
text: The King my father shall be made acquainted

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Of thy assault. If he shall think it fit

speaker: IMOGEN
text: A saucy stranger in his court to mart

speaker: IMOGEN
text: As in a Romish stew and to expound

speaker: IMOGEN
text: His beastly mind to us, he hath a court

speaker: IMOGEN
text: He little cares for and a daughter who

speaker: IMOGEN
text: He not respects at all.—What ho, Pisanio!

speaker: IACHIMO
text: O happy Leonatus! I may say

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The credit that thy lady hath of thee

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Deserves thy trust, and thy most perfect goodness

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Her assured credit.—Blessèd live you long,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: A lady to the worthiest sir that ever

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Country called his; and you his mistress, only

speaker: IACHIMO
text: For the most worthiest fit. Give me your pardon.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: I have spoke this to know if your affiance

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Were deeply rooted, and shall make your lord

speaker: IACHIMO
text: That which he is, new o’er; and he is one

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The truest mannered, such a holy witch

speaker: IACHIMO
text: That he enchants societies into him.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Half all men’s hearts are his.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: You make amends.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: He sits ’mongst men like a descended god.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: He hath a kind of honor sets him off

speaker: IACHIMO
text: More than a mortal seeming. Be not angry,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Most mighty princess, that I have adventured

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To try your taking of a false report, which hath

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Honored with confirmation your great judgment

speaker: IACHIMO
text: In the election of a sir so rare,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Which you know cannot err. The love I bear him

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Made me to fan you thus, but the gods made you,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Unlike all others, chaffless. Pray, your pardon.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: All’s well, sir. Take my power i’ th’ court for yours.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: My humble thanks. I had almost forgot

speaker: IACHIMO
text: T’ entreat your Grace but in a small request,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: And yet of moment too, for it concerns.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Your lord, myself, and other noble friends

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Are partners in the business.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Pray, what is ’t?

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Some dozen Romans of us and your lord—

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The best feather of our wing—have mingled sums

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To buy a present for the Emperor;

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Which I, the factor for the rest, have done

speaker: IACHIMO
text: In France. ’Tis plate of rare device and jewels

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Of rich and exquisite form, their values great.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: And I am something curious, being strange,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To have them in safe stowage. May it please you

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To take them in protection?

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Willingly;

speaker: IMOGEN
text: And pawn mine honor for their safety. Since

speaker: IMOGEN
text: My lord hath interest in them, I will keep them

speaker: IMOGEN
text: In my bedchamber.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: They are in a trunk

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Attended by my men. I will make bold

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To send them to you, only for this night.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: I must aboard tomorrow.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: O no, no.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Yes, I beseech, or I shall short my word

speaker: IACHIMO
text: By length’ning my return. From Gallia

speaker: IACHIMO
text: I crossed the seas on purpose and on promise

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To see your Grace.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I thank you for your pains.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: But not away tomorrow.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: O, I must, madam.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Therefore I shall beseech you, if you please

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To greet your lord with writing, do ’t tonight.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: I have outstood my time, which is material

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To th’ tender of our present.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I will write.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Send your trunk to me; it shall safe be kept

speaker: IMOGEN
text: And truly yielded you. You’re very welcome.
